testcase.name: tc_verify_multipleFieldsDragAndDrop

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //a[normalize-space()='Create template']' (tried for 20 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)
